about.title: About us
about.description1: We are a Vietnamese CG studio specializing in high-quality 3DCG, Animation, VR, and BIM services for the Japanese architecture and real estate market. Founded in 2019, we've grown to serve 50+ Japanese companies with photorealistic visuals that win client trust.
about.description2: Our team combines Japanese-standard quality expectations with cost-effective production from Vietnam — giving our clients the best of both worlds. We support NDA, work with all major 3D formats, and offer flexible, iterative workflows.

solution.label: SOLUTION
solution.title: What We Create
solution.ctaSubtitle: We will propose a solution tailored to your needs.

s1.desc:
Photorealistic still image rendering. We express the full appeal
of your project from diverse angles — exterior, interior, and aerial.

s2.desc:
Dynamic video production that conveys the full picture of a project.
Ideal for promotional tools and exhibition presentations.

s3.desc:
Interactive experiences where you can freely walk around in the browser.
Confirm spaces realistically before completion.

s4.desc:
Experience spaces through 360° panoramic views. Compatible with
smartphones and VR headsets for immersive experiences.

s5.desc:
Natural compositing of real photos and CG. Incorporate design
proposals into existing site photos for realistic presentations.

s6.desc:
Digital 3D models replacing traditional physical models.
Usable across presentations, reviews, and promotions.
